instruction: What class does cc.Layer extend?
How do you create a cc.Layer?
What does cc.Layer.bake() do?
output: layer.bake(): void — HTML5 only: caches children to a bake sprite for performance.

instruction: What does cc.Layer.unbake() do?
output: layer.unbake(): void — removes the bake cache created by bake().

instruction: How do you check if a cc.Layer is baked?
Is bake() available on all platforms?
output: No. bake() is HTML5 only. It caches children to a bake sprite.

instruction: What class does cc.LayerColor extend?
How do you create a cc.LayerColor?
output: new cc.LayerColor(color?: cc.Color) or new cc.LayerColor(color: cc.Color, width: number, height: number).

instruction: What is the static factory method for cc.LayerColor?
output: cc.LayerColor.create(color?: cc.Color): cc.LayerColor or cc.LayerColor.create(color, width, height).

instruction: How do you change only the width of a cc.LayerColor?
How do you change only the height of a cc.LayerColor?
How do you change both width and height of a cc.LayerColor at once?
What is the difference between changeWidth and changeWidthAndHeight on cc.LayerColor?
output: changeWidth(w) changes only width. changeWidthAndHeight(w, h) changes both width and height in one call.

instruction: How do you get the blend function of a cc.LayerColor?
What are the signatures of setBlendFunc on cc.LayerColor?
output: layer.setBlendFunc(src: cc.BlenderConst, dst: cc.BlenderConst): void or layer.setBlendFunc(blendFunc: cc.BlendFunc): void.

instruction: What does getBlendFunc return on cc.LayerColor?
What class does cc.LayerGradient extend?
How do you create a cc.LayerGradient?
output: new cc.LayerGradient(start: cc.Color, end: cc.Color, v?: cc.Point) — v is the gradient direction vector.

instruction: What is the static factory for cc.LayerGradient?
output: cc.LayerGradient.create(start: cc.Color, end: cc.Color, v?: cc.Point): cc.LayerGradient

instruction: How do you get the start color of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you set the start color of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you get the end color of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you set the end color of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you get the start opacity of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you set the start opacity of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you get the end opacity of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you set the end opacity of a cc.LayerGradient?
How do you get the gradient direction vector?
How do you set the gradient direction vector?
What does isCompressedInterpolation do on cc.LayerGradient?
output: layer.isCompressedInterpolation(): boolean — returns whether compressed interpolation is enabled.

instruction: How do you enable or disable compressed interpolation on cc.LayerGradient?
What direct properties does cc.LayerGradient expose?
output: startColor: cc.Color, endColor: cc.Color, startOpacity: number, endOpacity: number, vector: number.

instruction: Is cc.Layer.setOpacity() a valid method?
output: No. cc.Layer does not have setOpacity. Use cc.LayerColor which inherits opacity control, or set opacity on individual child nodes.

instruction: What class does cc.LayerMultiplex extend?
How do you create a cc.LayerMultiplex?
output: new cc.LayerMultiplex(...layers: cc.Layer[]) or cc.LayerMultiplex.create(...layers: cc.Layer[]).

instruction: How do you add a layer to cc.LayerMultiplex after creation?
How do you switch to a different layer in cc.LayerMultiplex?
output: multiplex.switchTo(n: number): void — shows layer at index n and removes current.

instruction: What is the difference between switchTo and switchToAndReleaseMe on cc.LayerMultiplex?
output: switchTo(n) switches to layer n and removes current. switchToAndReleaseMe(n) also releases/deallocates the current layer.

instruction: What are the parameters of switchToAndReleaseMe?
output: multiplex.switchToAndReleaseMe(n: number): void — n is the index of the layer to switch to.

instruction: Which class has the changeWidthAndHeight method?
output: cc.LayerColor — layer.changeWidthAndHeight(w: number, h: number): void.

instruction: Which class has getStartColor and setStartColor methods?
output: cc.LayerGradient — layer.getStartColor(): cc.Color and layer.setStartColor(color: cc.Color): void.

instruction: Is cc.LayerGradient.setDirection a valid method?
output: No. Use layer.setVector(v: cc.Point): void to set the gradient direction.

instruction: Is cc.LayerColor.setColor a valid method for changing the layer color?
output: No. Use the constructor new cc.LayerColor(color) or inherited cc.Node color methods. cc.LayerColor-specific sizing uses changeWidth/changeHeight.

instruction: What is the inheritance chain for cc.LayerGradient?
output: cc.LayerGradient extends cc.LayerColor extends cc.Layer extends cc.Node.
